title: T-026 — RMA schema + Server Actions + rma_list_page (SHIP-026) (11-shipping-g)
prompt:
# T-026 — RMA Phase 1 (schema + Server Actions + UI list)

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §9.1 (rma_requests, rma_lines), §8.5 Flow RMA Phase 1, §11 V-SHIP-RMA-01..03
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:468-534 (rma_list_page)
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 (RMA flow)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `rma_requests` + `rma_lines` schema; Server Actions for create/approve/receive/disposition; rma_list_page UI. RMA Detail (SHIP-027) is BL-SHIP-04 P2 — only stub link in this task.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration creates:
   - ENUM `rma_status_enum` ('pending','approved','receiving','received','processed','closed').
   - ENUM `rma_disposition_enum` ('restock','scrap','quality_hold').
   - `rma_requests` (org_id, rma_number text UNIQUE per org `RMA-YYYY-NNNNN`, customer_id FK, sales_order_id FK nullable, reason_code text references reason_codes WHERE context='rma', status rma_status_enum NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', total_value_gbp numeric(14,2), disposition rma_disposition_enum nullable, approved_at, approved_by, R13).
   - `rma_lines` (org_id, rma_request_id FK CASCADE, product_id, quantity_expected, quantity_received numeric(14,3) DEFAULT 0, lot_number, reason_notes, disposition rma_disposition_enum nullable, R13).
2. RLS + FORCE RLS via app.current_org_id().
3. Server Actions in `apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/rma.ts`:
   - `createRMA({ customerId, soId, lines, reason_code })` — INSERT rma_requests + lines; outbox `shipping.rma.created`. Permission `ship.so.create`.
   - `approveRMA(rmaId)` — UPDATE status='approved', approved_at, approved_by; outbox `shipping.rma.approved`. Permission `ship.so.confirm`.
   - `receiveRMA(rmaId, linesReceived)` — UPDATE quantity_received per line + status='received'; outbox `shipping.rma.received`.
   - `processRMA(rmaId, disposition)` — V-SHIP-RMA-02 (restock → create new LP in 05-WH with qa_status='pending' — call 05-WH create_lp Server Action; outbox `lp.created`); V-SHIP-RMA-03 (quality_hold → call 09-QA create_hold action; outbox `quality.hold.created`); permission `ship.rma.disposition`.
4. `/(shipping)/rma/page.tsx` renders rma_list_page (doc-screens.jsx:468-534): table cols (rma_number, customer, sales_order, status, total_value, disposition, created_at) + filter + Create RMA button.
5. BL-SHIP-04 (RMA Detail SHIP-027 4-tab screen not built) — link from list rows to /(shipping)/rma/[id] with a P2 ScaffoldedScreen + phase badge for now.
6. Four states + i18n `shipping.rma.*`.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/00XX_shipping_rma.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/shipping/rma.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/rma.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/__tests__/rma.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/rma/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/rma/_components/rma-list.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/rma/[id]/page.tsx [create — P2 ScaffoldedScreen placeholder]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/rma/__tests__/rma-list.test.tsx [create]
- packages/events/src/shipping.ts [modify — ShippingRMACreated/Approved/Received/Processed]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when DB inspected, then rma_requests + rma_lines exist with org_id NOT NULL + R13 + RLS + FORCE RLS via app.current_org_id().
2. Given createRMA succeeds, when DB inspected, then rma_requests + rma_lines rows exist in same tx; outbox shipping.rma.created emitted.
3. Given processRMA with disposition='restock', when it runs, then a new LP is created in 05-WH (via the 05-WH create_lp Server Action) with qa_status='pending'; outbox lp.created emitted (cross-module).
4. Given processRMA with disposition='quality_hold', when it runs, then a quality_holds row is created in 09-QA (via 09-QA create_hold action); outbox quality.hold.created emitted.
5. Given rma_list_page renders, when compared to doc-screens.jsx:468-534, then header + filters + 7-col table + Create button match — RTL + Playwright screenshot.
6. Given /(shipping)/rma/[id]/page.tsx renders, when reviewer inspects, then a P2 ScaffoldedScreen with phase badge appears (BL-SHIP-04 documented as P2 placeholder).

## Test strategy
- RED: testcontainers Postgres for schema; vitest for Server Actions; RTL for UI list; asserts AC 1-6.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-rma-schema && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run shipping/rma`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-rma.spec.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not create LP rows directly — call 05-WH create_lp Server Action.
- Do not create quality_holds rows directly — call 09-QA create_hold action.
- Do not name business-scope column tenant_id.
- Do not read current_setting GUCs.
- Do not implement RMA Detail 4-tab screen in P1 (BL-SHIP-04 = P2 scaffold).
- Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.

pipeline_inputs.description: RMA schema + Server Actions (create/approve/receive/process) + rma_list_page UI + BL-SHIP-04 P2 ScaffoldedScreen placeholder for SHIP-027.
pipeline_inputs.details: RMA cross-writes: restock → 05-WH create_lp; quality_hold → 09-QA create_hold. Reason codes from reason_codes ref table filtered by context='rma'.
out_of_scope: Do not implement RMA Detail 4-tab screen (BL-SHIP-04 P2).
Do not implement carrier return pickup (Phase 2).
cross_module_dependencies: 01-npd/T-001 (product FG SSOT — variance_tolerance_pct + allergen attributes; coverage hygiene per R3 audit 2026-05-14)
09-quality/T-064 (consume gate — processRMA disposition='quality_hold' consumes holdsGuard; per 2026-05-14 audit)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration runs, when DB inspected, then rma_requests + rma_lines exist with org_id NOT NULL + R13 + RLS + FORCE RLS; AND given createRMA succeeds, then rma_requests + rma_lines rows exist and outbox shipping.rma.created emitted.

Given processRMA disposition='restock', when it runs, then new LP created in 05-WH via create_lp Server Action with qa_status='available'; AND given disposition='quality_hold', when it runs, then quality_holds row created in 09-QA via create_hold (holdsGuard per T-064) and outbox shipping.rma.quality_hold_created emitted.

Given rma_list_page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/doc-screens.jsx:468-534, then header + filters + 7-col table + Create button match prototype (parity checklist).

Given /(shipping)/rma/[id]/page.tsx renders, when reviewer inspects, then P2 ScaffoldedScreen with phase badge appears (BL-SHIP-15); UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.
test_strategy: RED: testcontainers Postgres for schema + vitest for Server Actions + RTL for UI list asserting AC 1-6.
Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test shipping-rma-schema && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run shipping/rma`.
risk_red_lines: Do not create LP rows directly — call 05-WH create_lp.
Do not create quality_holds directly — call 09-QA create_hold.
Do not name business-scope column tenant_id.
Do not implement RMA Detail 4-tab screen in P1.
Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
Do not bypass the 09-quality consume gate (T-064 v_active_holds) — processRMA disposition='quality_hold' must route through holdsGuard before creating a hold.
